# Anant Coal Depot

> Family-run coal supplier in Guwahati, Assam, India, established in 1990 by Tarachand Jain.
> Location: NH 37, Lalmati, Near Nidhi Bhawan, Guwahati, Assam 781029.
> Hours: 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM, all 7 days. Phone/WhatsApp: +91 94350 18204 (Tarachand Jain),
> +91 99574 39095 (Anant Jain). GSTIN: 18AABHT9778F1ZI. Bulk and retail supply,
> no fixed minimum order, pan India delivery (tempo fare borne by customer), free depot pickup.
> Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/pH84QbjiQVN52hRXA

## Products
- [Hard Coke](https://anantcoaldepot.in/hard-coke-guwahati/): processed high-carbon fuel for furnaces, bhattis and brick kilns; sold in Chota (small) and Bada (large) size grades, locally called chota koyla and bada koyla.
- [Hard Coke Dust](https://anantcoaldepot.in/hard-coke-dust-guwahati/): fine-grade coke, industry name coke breeze; economical fuel for brick kilns and boilers.
- [Charcoal](https://anantcoaldepot.in/charcoal-supplier-guwahati/): natural wood charcoal, locally lakdi koyla (Assamese: kathkoyla); used by restaurants, dhabas, tandoors and homes.
- [Steam Coal](https://anantcoaldepot.in/steam-coal-guwahati/): raw coal, locally kacha koyla; for boilers, steam generation and industrial heating.
- [Earthing Coal and Earthing Salt](https://anantcoaldepot.in/earthing-coal-earthing-salt-guwahati/): materials packed in alternating layers in electrical earthing pits; Anant Coal Depot is one of the very few Guwahati stockists of both.

## Facts
- Established: 1990. Family business, currently run by Tarachand Jain and Anant Jain.
- Serves Guwahati (Lalmati, Beltola, Dispur, Jalukbari, Khanapara, Basistha, Narengi, Six Mile and other areas), nearby districts (Nalbari, Rangia, Barpeta, Nagaon), all of Assam, all Northeast Indian states (Meghalaya, Arunachal Pradesh, Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram, Tripura, Sikkim) by truck load, and pan India for suitable bulk orders.
- Customers include households, hotels, restaurants, dhabas, tea gardens, brick kilns (itta bhatta), aluminium utensil industries, foundries, rolling mills, factories, traders, electricians and electrical contractors (earthing applications).
- Pricing is quoted on enquiry because coal rates move with the market.

## Guides (Coal Knowledge Centre)
- [Coal Knowledge Centre](https://anantcoaldepot.in/guides/): hub for all buyer guides and industry pages.
- [Hard Coke vs Steam Coal](https://anantcoaldepot.in/guides/hard-coke-vs-steam-coal/): which fuel suits furnaces, kilns and boilers.
- [Coal Buying Guide for Guwahati](https://anantcoaldepot.in/guides/coal-buying-guide-guwahati/): quantities, market-linked pricing, GST billing, inspection, delivery.
- [Quintal, Tonne & Truck Load](https://anantcoaldepot.in/guides/coal-units-weights-india/): Indian coal trade units; 1 quintal = 100 kg, 1 tonne = 1,000 kg = 10 quintals.
- [Charcoal for Tandoors & Grills](https://anantcoaldepot.in/guides/charcoal-for-restaurants-tandoor/): buyer's guide for hotels, restaurants and dhabas.
- [Earthing Coal & Salt Guide](https://anantcoaldepot.in/guides/earthing-pit-coal-salt-guide/): why coal and salt are layered in earthing pits (IS 3043 practice).

## Industry supply
- [Brick kilns / itta bhatta](https://anantcoaldepot.in/coal-for-brick-kilns/): hard coke and coke breeze, truck loads across Assam.
- [Hotels, restaurants & dhabas](https://anantcoaldepot.in/coal-for-hotels-restaurants-dhabas/): recurring charcoal supply across Guwahati.
- [Foundries, rolling mills & aluminium works](https://anantcoaldepot.in/coal-for-foundries-rolling-mills/): hard coke for furnaces, steam coal for boilers.
- [Tea gardens](https://anantcoaldepot.in/coal-for-tea-gardens/): seasonal truck-load fuel supply into Assam's tea districts.

## Delivery
- [Delivery across Guwahati, Assam & Northeast India](https://anantcoaldepot.in/coal-delivery-assam-northeast/): tempo delivery citywide (fare borne by customer), truck loads to all Assam districts and Northeast states, pan India for suitable orders, free depot pickup.
